ShortDescription.Value: Finally a simple way to adjust pricing of the stuff in-game!

Publish.LongDescription:
Is your city drowning in millions of bucks? Do you want to change how much you spend on roads? Well, **now you can!**
## Features - 3 settings presets (Vanilla, Balanced, Realistic) - adjust price & upkeep of roads, tram & train tracks manually - more to come!
## Planned features - fine-tuned road pricing (by road category) - custom tunnel/bridge pricing - other network pricing - landscaping pricing - pricing of roundabouts, cul-de-sacs etc. - adjust pricing based on network elevation
## Compatibility note This mod should be compatible with any other mods & assets. All prices are modified at runtime; when you remove the mod, all prices should go back to vanilla values.
Publish.ChangeLog: - working price & upkeep modification of tram & train tracks
